title: Surgeon Vacancy at Philips India Healthcare Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Philips India Healthcare Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare Capital India in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare Capital India:
Philips India Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare Capital India!
